name: ui
description: Generates UI components and feedback forms. Use when user mentions コンポーネント, component, UI, ヒーロー, hero, フォーム, form, フィードバック, feedback, 問い合わせ. Do NOT load for: 認証機能, バックエンド実装, データベース操作, ビジネスロジック.
capabilities: Creates accessible UI with WCAG compliance
Includes hero sections, pricing tables, contact forms
author: Chachamaru127
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill providing UI generation guidance. All 24 static findings are false positives triggered by YAML front matter, Japanese Unicode text, SHA-256 hash strings, and markdown syntax. No executable code, network calls, or malicious patterns exist. Legitimate frontend development tool.
valueStatement: Stop manually coding UI components from scratch. This skill generates accessible, responsive UI components and feedback forms using shadcn/ui and modern best practices.
userTitle: Generate UI Components and Feedback Forms

useCases.title: Rapid UI prototyping
useCases.description: Quickly generate hero sections, pricing tables, and feature cards for landing pages

useCases.title: User feedback collection
useCases.description: Implement bug reports, feature requests, and satisfaction surveys in applications

useCases.title: WCAG-compliant components
useCases.description: Ensure all UI components meet accessibility standards with built-in checklists

promptTemplates.title: Hero Section
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a hero section with heading, subheading, and CTA button for a SaaS product using shadcn/ui

promptTemplates.title: Pricing Table
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a responsive pricing table with 3 tiers and feature comparison using shadcn components

promptTemplates.title: Feedback Form
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a feedback form with rating, category selection, and text input for bug reports

promptTemplates.title: Contact Section
promptTemplates.prompt: Build a contact form with validation, accessibility features, and proper labels

bestPractices: Always include alt text for images in components
Ensure keyboard navigation works for all interactive elements
Use semantic HTML with proper heading hierarchy
antiPatterns: Using color alone to convey information
Creating buttons without proper labels or ARIA attributes
Skipping heading levels (h1 to h3 without h2)

faq.question: What frameworks does this support?
faq.answer: Currently supports React with shadcn/ui components and Tailwind CSS

faq.question: Can I customize the generated components?
faq.answer: Yes, components are fully customizable with standard React props and Tailwind classes

faq.question: Does it handle form validation?
faq.answer: Yes, generated forms include client-side validation with accessible error messages

faq.question: Is the output accessible by default?
faq.answer: All components follow WCAG guidelines with built-in accessibility checklists

faq.question: Can it generate components in other languages?
faq.answer: Documentation is in Japanese but components can be generated in any language

faq.question: Does it install dependencies automatically?
faq.answer: It provides instructions for installing required shadcn/ui components
